message.content:
@startuml
participant "Web User" as User
participant "index" as Index
participant "Main.view" as MainView
participant "Image.View" as ImageView
participant "ImageController" as ImageController
participant "DB" as DB
participant "DBE" as DBE
participant "ImageModel" as ImageModel
participant "images" as ImagesDB
participant "Images" as Images

User --> Index : "1:Need to see some Pictures"

ImageController --> DB : "1:1 new ImageController( new DB ( DBE ) )"

DB --> DBE : getDNS(); getUsers(); getPass()

ImageController --> ImagesDB : ImageController->fetchAll() : $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare(SELECT id,filename,title,description FROM images)

ImageController --> ImagesDB : ImageController->fetchAll() : $stmt -> execute()

$results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_CLASS, ImageModel::class)

Index --> ImageController : "1:0|1|* $images array"

ImageController --> MainView : render ()

MainView --> ImageView : + layout

ImageView --> User : he/she dont know how many work it was :-)

@enduml
